case_results.query: A user says their bridge deposit is still pending after a few minutes. What should support check first?

hits.text: # Aurora L2 Quickstart The safest way to get started is to use the official docs, ask questions in public, and avoid unsolicited direct messages. Support is handled in public support threads. Moderators will never DM first to ask for passwords, wallet keys, seed phrases, or remote access. If a bridge deposit is delayed, check the status page first. Normal bridge transfers can take 10 to 30 minutes depending on the destination chain and the relayer queue.

# Aurora L2 Security Never share your seed phrase or private key with anyone. No legitimate support person will ask you to install remote access software, join a screen share, or paste a recovery phrase into a form. If someone contacts you in DMs claiming to be support, block them and ask in public instead.

# Aurora L2 Governance Governance proposals are posted to the governance forum before they go onchain for voting. Each proposal has a discussion period before voting opens. If you are looking for the current status of a proposal, start with the governance forum and then check the latest Snapshot vote.

case_results.query: Why does one dashboard show a different APR than another one for Delta Swap?

hits.text: # Delta Swap FAQ Reward APR is an estimate, not a guarantee. It changes as liquidity depth, trading volume, and incentive emissions change. If two dashboards show different numbers, first check whether one is showing gross APR and the other is showing net APR after fees or incentives. Price speculation is not part of support. For factual updates, check the latest official announcement and the product docs.

# Delta Swap Support If the issue is on a partner bridge or a centralized exchange, you need to contact that service directly. Delta Swap support can help you confirm whether the app is degraded, but it cannot fix a third-party outage from inside this community. If you need help, post the exact steps you took, what happened, and what you expected to happen.

# Delta Swap Incidents For outages, degraded performance, or indexing delays, check the status page and the latest incident update first. Do not treat listing rumors or launch rumors as confirmed unless they appear in the official announcement channel or the incident page.
